description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits WANT before establishing the session with HELLO.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because the seed did not establish the session with HELLO first.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the session sequencing violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a session-sequencing negative interop case beyond BYE-after-close handling.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness injects WANT before HELLO.
